title: 10 best herbal teas for dark lips
intro_desc: Herbal teas for dark lips are natural remedies that help reduce the darkness of lips, making them appear fuller and more attractive. These teas typically contain ingredients like chamomile, rose petals, hibiscus, and sage, which are rich in antioxidants and vitamins that nourish and moisturize the lips. By drinking these teas or using them as a lip rinse, the lips absorb the nutrients, promoting healthy lip color and texture. For example, chamomile tea has anti-inflammatory properties that can soothe and lighten dark lips, while rose petals contain vitamins A and C that help exfoliate and rejuvenate the lips. By using herbal teas for dark lips, individuals can improve their confidence and self-esteem, feeling more comfortable and happy with their appearance.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: New England aster tea helps with dark lips because it is rich in antioxidants that can help to improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation. The tea is made from the flowers and leaves of the aster plant, which contain compounds that can help to lighten and brighten the skin. Drinking aster tea regularly can help to improve the overall health of the lips, reducing the appearance of dark patches and promoting a more even skin tone. Additionally, aster tea has anti-bacterial and anti-fungal properties that can help to keep the lips healthy and free from infections, further contributing to a brighter and more even lip color.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: New England aster tea's anti-inflammatory property reduces inflammation and irritation, which can help lighten dark lips. This property is important for dark lips as inflammation can cause melanin production, leading to darker lip color. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids and phenolic acids.

Antioxidant: The antioxidant property of New England aster tea helps protect lips from free radical damage, preventing melanin overproduction and darkening of the lips. This property is important for dark lips as it helps maintain an even skin tone and prevents further darkening. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils.

Exfoliating: New England aster tea has natural exfoliating properties that help remove dead skin cells, promoting cell turnover and lightening dark lips. This property is important for dark lips as it aids in the removal of excess melanin and reveals fresher, lighter skin. The active constituents responsible for this property include essential oils and tannins.

Moisturizing: New England aster tea has moisturizing properties that help keep lips hydrated, preventing dryness and reducing the appearance of dark lips. This property is important for dark lips as dryness can exacerbate melanin production and darken lip color. The active constituents responsible for this property include mucilage and essential oils.

Antimelanogenic: New England aster tea has antimelanogenic properties that help inhibit melanin production, reducing the appearance of dark lips. This property is important for dark lips as it directly targets the cause of dark lip color. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids and phenolic acids.
remedy_recipe: Collect 2-3 dried New England Aster flowers and leaves.
Crush the herbs gently to release their oils, then place them in a teapot.
Boil 2 cups of water, then pour it over the herbs in the teapot.
Steep the tea for 10-15 minutes, then strain out the herbs.
Drink the tea 2-3 times a day, focusing on sipping the tea slowly to allow it to stain the lips.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Canada goldenrod tea helps with dark lips because it is rich in flavonoids and other antioxidants that can help to improve circulation and reduce inflammation. These properties can help to increase the flow of oxygen and nutrients to the lips, which can help to lighten and even out their color. Additionally, goldenrod tea has natural anti-bacterial and anti-fungal properties, which can help to keep the lips healthy and free from infections that can cause darkening. Drinking goldenrod tea regularly can also help to detoxify the body and improve overall health, which can contribute to a brighter, more even complexion.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Canada goldenrod tea's anti-inflammatory property, due to its active constituents like flavonoids and volatile oils, helps reduce inflammation and irritation that can cause dark lips.
Antioxidant: The high antioxidant content, from flavonoids and phenolic acids, combats free radicals that may contribute to lip darkening.
Antibacterial: With its antibacterial property, the tea inhibits bacterial growth that can lead to lip discoloration and infections.
Astringent: Canada goldenrod tea's astringent property, caused by tannins, helps tighten and tone lips, reducing the appearance of dark lips.
Moisturizing: The moisturizing effect, from mucilage and saponins, keeps lips hydrated and prevents dryness that can result in dark lips.
remedy_recipe: In a stove-top kettle, boil 2 cups of water for 5-7 minutes.
Meanwhile, crush 2 tablespoons of dried goldenrod herb in a mortar and pestle.
Place the crushed goldenrod herb in a teapot and pour boiling water over it.
Steep the herb in hot water for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the tea into a cup, discard the herb, and drink the tea while it's still warm.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Bee balm tea helps with dark lips because it is rich in antioxidants that can improve circulation and promote cell regeneration. The tea's anti-inflammatory properties can also help reduce inflammation and irritation that can contribute to darkening of the lips. Additionally, bee balm tea contains vitamins and minerals that can nourish and moisturize the lips, preventing dryness and cracking that can lead to darkening. Drinking bee balm tea regularly can help lighten and brighten the lips, giving them a healthy and natural appearance.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Bee balm tea's anti-inflammatory property, due to the presence of eugenol and thymol, can help reduce inflammation and redness, which can contribute to the appearance of dark lips.
Antioxidant: The antioxidant properties of bee balm tea, from its rosmarinic and salvianolic acids, can help protect lips from environmental stressors and free radicals that can lead to darkening.

Antimicrobial: The antimicrobial property of bee balm tea, because of its thymol and carvacrol content, can help keep lips clean and free from bacteria that can cause infections and contribute to darkening.
Exfoliating: Bee balm tea's exfoliating property, due to its mildly astringent and exfoliating compounds, can help remove dead skin cells and promote cell turnover, which can help even out lip color.
Hydrating: The hydrating property of bee balm tea, thanks to its tannins and essential oils, can help keep lips moisturized and prevent dryness, which can help reduce the appearance of dark lips.
remedy_recipe: In a glass jar, combine 1 tablespoon of dried bee balm leaves and 1 cup of boiling water.
Allow the mixture to steep for 10-15 minutes to extract the herb's properties.
Strain the tea through a fine-mesh sieve to remove the solid particles.
Discard the used bee balm leaves and transfer the tea to a cup.
Drink the tea while it's still warm, 2-3 times a day for dark lip treatment.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Danshen tea helps with dark lips because it contains powerful antioxidants that promote blood circulation and help eliminate toxins from the body. The tea's active compounds, such as danshensu and salvianolic acid, improve blood flow to the lips, giving them a healthy and natural color. Danshen tea also has anti-inflammatory properties that reduce inflammation and swelling, which can contribute to darkening of the lips. By promoting healthy blood circulation and reducing inflammation, danshen tea can help lighten and even out the skin tone of the lips, giving them a brighter and more youthful appearance.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Danshen tea's anti-inflammatory property reduces inflammation and irritation, which can help lighten dark lips. This property is important because inflammation can cause pigmentation and darkening of the lips. The active constituents responsible for this property include tanshinones, salvianolic acid, and danshensu.

Antioxidant: Danshen tea has strong antioxidant properties that help protect the lips from free radical damage, which can cause darkening. This property is important because free radicals can damage skin cells and lead to pigmentation. The active constituents responsible for this property include salvianolic acid, tanshinones, and phenolic acids.

Improves Circulation: Danshen tea improves blood circulation, which can help increase oxygen and nutrient supply to the lips. This property is important because improved circulation can help even out skin tone and reduce pigmentation. The active constituents responsible for this property include tanshinones, salvianolic acid, and danshensu.

Exfoliating: Danshen tea has natural exfoliating properties that help remove dead skin cells, which can accumulate and cause darkening. This property is important because removing dead skin cells can reveal brighter, smoother skin. The active constituents responsible for this property include tanshinones and salvianolic acid.

Moisturizing: Danshen tea has moisturizing properties that help keep the lips hydrated and plump. This property is important because dry, chapped lips can become darker and more pigmented. The active constituents responsible for this property include tanshinones, salvianolic acid, and danshensu.
remedy_recipe: In a stove-heated pot, boil 2 cups of water.
Add 3 tablespoons of dried danshen (Salvia miltiorrhiza) roots and steep for 20 minutes.
Filter the tea through a fine sieve to remove the herb particles.
Add honey or stevia to taste.
Consume the tea twice a day for best results.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pomegranate tea helps with dark lips because it is rich in antioxidants and vitamins that promote healthy lip color. The tea's polyphenols and tannins help to remove dead skin cells and promote cell turnover, revealing lighter and brighter lips. Additionally, pomegranate tea has anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce inflammation and irritation, which can contribute to darkening of the lips. Drinking pomegranate tea regularly can also improve circulation and increase oxygen and nutrient supply to the lips, leading to a more even and radiant complexion. Overall, pomegranate tea is a natural and effective way to help lighten and brighten dark lips.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Pomegranate tea is rich in antioxidants, such as polyphenols and tannins, which can help protect the lips from environmental stressors, reducing the appearance of dark lips.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in pomegranate tea, like punicalagins, can help soothe and reduce inflammation, promoting healthy lip color.
Exfoliating properties: Pomegranate tea contains natural acids, such as punicic and ellagic acids, that can gently exfoliate dead skin cells, aiding in the removal of dark, discolored lip cells.
Collagen-boosting properties: Pomegranate tea is rich in vitamin C, which supports collagen production, helping to maintain lip fullness and reducing the appearance of dark, thin lips.

Moisturizing properties: Pomegranate tea has moisturizing properties due to its high polyphenol content, which can help hydrate and soften lips, improving their overall appearance and reducing dark lip discoloration.
remedy_recipe: In a pot, combine 2 cups of water, 1 tablespoon of dried pomegranate peels, and 1 tablespoon of dried rose petals.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and let it simmer for 15 minutes.
Turn off the heat, add 1 teaspoon of honey and 1 teaspoon of lemon juice, then stir well.
Strain the tea into a cup, discarding the solids.
Drink the tea while it's still warm, 2-3 times a day for best results.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Perilla tea helps with dark lips because it is rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that can improve skin health. The tea is made from the leaves of the Perilla frutescens plant, which contains high levels of vitamin C, E, and other nutrients that can help to lighten and even out skin tone. Additionally, Perilla tea has been shown to inhibit the production of melanin, the pigment responsible for darkening lips, making it an effective natural remedy for treating dark lips. Drinking Perilla tea or applying it topically can help to nourish and protect the lips, promoting healthy lip color and texture.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Perilla tea's anti-inflammatory property, due to rosmarinic acid and other flavonoids, helps reduce inflammation and redness in the lips, promoting a more even skin tone.
Antioxidant: The high antioxidant content, primarily from rosmarinic acid and various flavonoids, helps protect lips from environmental stressors, preventing further darkening of the lips.
Exfoliating: Perilla tea contains exfoliating properties, attributed to essential fatty acids, which help remove dead skin cells, revealing a smoother and more even-toned lip surface.
Moisturizing: The moisturizing property of perilla tea, owing to its essential fatty acids, helps keep lips hydrated and nourished, reducing the appearance of dark lips.
Anti-melanogenic: Perilla tea's anti-melanogenic property, attributed to rosmarinic acid and other polyphenols, inhibits melanin production, preventing the darkening of lips.
remedy_recipe: Measure 2 teaspoons of dried perilla leaves.
Boil 2 cups of water for 3-5 minutes.
Steep the perilla leaves in boiling water for 5-10 minutes.
Strain the liquid to remove leaves.
Drink the tea while warm, 1-2 times a day.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Guarana tea helps with dark lips because it contains high levels of caffeine and antioxidants that can improve blood circulation and help to detoxify the body. This increased blood flow can lead to a brighter and more even skin tone, including the lips. Additionally, guarana tea's antioxidant properties can help to protect the lips from environmental stressors that can contribute to darkening. The regular consumption of guarana tea can help to keep the lips looking healthy, plump, and naturally pink.
remedy_properties: Stimulates blood flow: Guarana tea contains caffeine and theobromine, which stimulate blood flow and help to increase oxygen and nutrient supply to the lips, promoting lip health and reducing darkness.

Antioxidant properties: Guarana tea is rich in antioxidants, such as tannins and flavonoids, which help to protect the lips from damage caused by free radicals and environmental stressors, reducing lip darkness.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Guarana tea has anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce inflammation and irritation in the lips, promoting lip health and reducing lip darkness.
Moisturizing properties: Guarana tea contains caffeine and theobromine, which have a diuretic effect and help to increase hydration in the lips, keeping them moisturized and reducing lip darkness.

Exfoliating properties: Guarana tea contains caffeine and theobromine, which have a mild exfoliating effect and help to remove dead skin cells from the lips, revealing smoother, healthier, and less dark lips.
remedy_recipe: Boil 1 cup of water for 3-5 minutes.
Add 1 teaspoon of guarana tea leaves to a teapot.
Pour the boiling water over the guarana tea leaves and steep for 5-10 minutes.
Strain the tea into a cup, discarding the tea leaves.
Drink the tea twice a day for dark lip color.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Passion fruit tea helps with dark lips because it is rich in vitamin C and antioxidants that promote healthy skin cell production and renewal. These nutrients help to lighten and brighten the skin, including the lips, reducing the appearance of dark patches and discoloration. Additionally, passion fruit tea has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to soothe and heal dry, chapped lips, preventing further damage and promoting a healthy, even skin tone. Drinking passion fruit tea regularly can provide these benefits both internally and externally, leading to a brighter, more even complexion and smoother, softer lips.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Passion fruit tea contains high levels of antioxidants, such as vitamin C, that help protect the lips from free radical damage and prevent darkening.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The tea has anti-inflammatory compounds, including flavonoids, that reduce inflammation and help even out skin tone, lightening dark lips.
Exfoliating properties: Passion fruit tea contains natural acids, such as malic and citric acids, that gently exfoliate dead skin cells, promoting cell turnover and revealing lighter, brighter lips.
Moisturizing properties: The tea is rich in essential fatty acids and vitamin E, which help lock in moisture, keeping lips hydrated and plump, reducing the appearance of dark, dry lips.

Collagen-boosting properties: Passion fruit tea is high in vitamin C and other antioxidants that stimulate collagen production, promoting skin elasticity and firmness, which can help prevent and reduce darkening of the lips.
remedy_recipe: Infuse 1 tablespoon of dried passion flower petals and 1 teaspoon of hibiscus flowers in 2 cups of boiling water for 10 minutes.
Steep 1 teaspoon of dried rose petals and 1 teaspoon of dried chamomile flowers in the hot floral infusion for 5 minutes.
Strain the herbal tea and discard the spent flowers.
Mix in 1 teaspoon of honey and 1 teaspoon of aloe vera gel into the tea, stirring until well combined.
Consume the herbal passion fruit tea for dark lips, sipping slowly and allowing the tea to stain the lips naturally.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oregano tea helps with dark lips because it is rich in antioxidants that can help to reduce the appearance of hyperpigmentation and promote healthy lip color. The tea also has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to soothe and heal dry, chapped lips, which can contribute to darkening. Additionally, oregano tea contains vitamins and minerals that can help to nourish and protect the lips, keeping them healthy and hydrated. Drinking oregano tea regularly can help to improve the overall health and appearance of the lips, leading to a more even and natural tone.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Oregano tea contains high levels of antioxidants, such as rosmarinic acid and thymol, which can help protect the lips from free radical damage and reduce oxidative stress, contributing to dark lips.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in oregano tea, such as carvacrol and thymol, can help reduce inflammation and irritation, which can contribute to darkening of the lips.

Antibacterial properties: Oregano tea has strong antibacterial properties, due to its high content of thymol and carvacrol, which can help eliminate harmful bacteria that can cause lip discoloration and infections.

Exfoliating properties: Oregano tea contains natural acids, such as rosmarinic acid, that can help exfoliate dead skin cells and promote cell turnover, which can help even out skin tone and reduce dark spots on the lips.

Moisturizing properties: Oregano tea has moisturizing properties, due to its high content of polyphenols and flavonoids, which can help hydrate and nourish the lips, preventing dryness and cracking that can contribute to dark lips.
remedy_recipe: In a stove-heated pot, boil 2 cups of water for 3-5 minutes.
Add 1 tablespoon of dried oregano leaves to the boiling water, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Turn off heat, cover the pot and let the mixture steep for an additional 10 minutes.
Strain the oregano tea, discarding the leaves, and allow it to cool down.
Drink the cooled oregano tea, aiming for 2 cups a day, for a natural way to help dark lips.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sweet basil tea helps with dark lips because it is rich in antioxidants that promote skin cell renewal and improve skin tone. The tea's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce inflammation and irritation that can lead to darkening of the lips. Additionally, sweet basil tea contains vitamin C, which can help to lighten and brighten the skin, reducing the appearance of dark lips. Drinking sweet basil tea regularly can also help to improve overall skin health, leading to a more even skin tone and brighter complexion.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Sweet basil tea's anti-inflammatory property helps reduce inflammation and irritation, which can lighten dark lips and promote healing. This property is due to the presence of essential oils and phenolic compounds.

Antioxidant: The antioxidant properties of sweet basil tea protect lips from environmental stressors and free radicals, which can cause darkening and aging. These antioxidants include rosmarinic acid, caffeic acid, and eugenol.

Exfoliating: Sweet basil tea has mild exfoliating properties that help remove dead skin cells, revealing a smoother and brighter lip surface. This is due to the presence of essential oils, which contain alpha-hydroxy acids.

Moisturizing: The moisturizing property of sweet basil tea helps keep lips hydrated and nourished, preventing dryness and darkening. This property is due to the presence of essential oils, which contain fatty acids and antioxidants.

Circulation-boosting: Sweet basil tea helps improve blood circulation, which can enhance lip color and reduce darkening. This property is due to the presence of eugenol, which has a stimulating effect on blood flow.
remedy_recipe: In a small pot, boil 2 cups of water for 3-5 minutes.
Add 2 teaspoons of dried sweet basil leaves to the boiling water.
Reduce heat and let the mixture simmer for 5-7 minutes.
Strain the tea into a cup, discarding the leaves.
Allow the tea to cool down to a drinkable temperature before consuming.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat dark lips with herbal teas is by using them as a natural lip scrub. Steep the herbal tea in hot water, then let it cool. Mix the cooled tea with brown sugar to create a scrub. Gently rub the scrub on your lips for a few minutes, then rinse off. The antioxidants in the herbal tea and the exfoliating properties of the sugar will help to lighten and smooth your lips. Regular use will result in visibly lighter and softer lips.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to dark lips that are treated with herbal teas are often related to skin and oral health. For instance, dry, chapped, or dark lips can be treated with herbal teas like chamomile or rosehip, which are rich in antioxidants and help to soothe and moisturize the lips. Additionally, herbal teas like sage or peppermint can be used to treat cold sores or inflammation around the lips. These teas have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce redness, swelling, and pain. Furthermore, drinking herbal teas like green or black tea can improve overall oral health, as they are rich in polyphenols that can help to prevent plaque buildup and reduce the risk of gum disease. However, it is important to note that while herbal teas can be helpful in treating these ailments, they should not be used as a substitute for medical treatment.
